calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., appeared for Petitioner and moving party: no other appearances.
Tentative ruling adopted: Petitioner State of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S 1st Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Pamela Underwood, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: People of The State of California.
No other appearances.

Tentative Ruling adopted: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
